content: Hi, I'm so glad to be talking to you. I've been working non-stop on this yoga instruction project and I'm ready for a break.
You've been putting in a lot of hours. What's the project about if you don't mind me asking?
We're trying to create a new yoga program for our studio. I've been working with my team to develop a series of classes and workshops.
That sounds like a challenging but rewarding project. How do you like working as a yoga instructor compared to when you were working on your own?

I actually really enjoy it. I love the freedom of creating my own classes and being able to focus on my students' needs. Plus, I've been able to pursue my hobby of marathon running more seriously since I have more free time.
That's great to hear! Marathon running is a wonderful hobby. Have you signed up for any upcoming marathons?
Yeah, I've signed up for the Boston Marathon in April. I'm excited to run in my hometown.
That's amazing! The Boston Marathon is such an iconic event. So, what's the plan for your yoga program after it's launched?
We're going to start marketing the program and reaching out to potential students. My colleague, Emily, and I will be leading the marketing efforts.
It sounds like you have a lot of exciting work ahead of you. Do you have any fun plans for the weekend to unwind?
Actually, I'm planning to take my dog, Willow, on a hike with my friend, Jack, on Saturday and then work on my podcast listening list on Sunday.
That sounds like a great way to relax. Podcasts are so much fun to listen to. What kind of podcasts are you into?
I'm a big fan of true crime podcasts. I love the thrill of trying to solve the mystery.
I can see how that would be entertaining. Well, I hope you have a great weekend and get some time to relax before your marathon in April.
Thanks, I'm looking forward to it. I might even try my hand at stand-up comedy on Sunday.
Stand-up comedy is another one of your hobbies, right? What kind of jokes do you like to tell?
Yeah, I love making people laugh. I usually tell jokes about my experiences as a yoga instructor and marathon runner.
I'll have to come see you perform sometime. Well, it was great chatting with you about your work and hobbies. Let me know if you need any help with your yoga program.
Will do, thanks for the offer. I think I've got everything under control, but it's always nice to have someone to bounce ideas off of.
Absolutely, that's what I'm here for. Have a great weekend and good luck with your marathon!
Thanks, you too! I'm planning to take my vintage car out for a spin on Saturday morning before I go hiking with Jack.
That sounds like a fun morning. I hope you enjoy the drive.
Yeah, me too. I've been trying to get back into restoring my vintage car more regularly since I adopted Willow.
It's great that you're making time for your hobbies. Well, I'll let you get back to work. Feel free to reach out if you need anything else.
Will do, thanks again for the chat. I'm looking forward to the weekend and getting some work done on my wellness coaching business.
It was my pleasure. Have a great weekend and good luck with your business!
You too, thanks for the well wishes. I might even start a new wellness program on Sunday to help my clients with their fitness goals.
Sounds like a plan. Take care and don't hesitate to reach out if you need anything else.
